forecasts.short: Partly Cloudy then Chance Rain Showers
forecasts.detailed: A chance of rain showers after midnight. Partly cloudy, with a low around 38. North wind 0 to 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
